articles.title: No, betrayal is never normal
articles.description: Human history has always carried the stains of betrayal. The wound hurts differently because it comes not from an enemy, but from someone once trusted enough to stand close. The greater danger is when betrayal ceases to shock people’s conscience, as it happens during elections. What did Valluvar write about betrayal by allies? Listen in.

articles.title: ‘Value‐added cashew apple products yet to reach people’
articles.description: Senior developmental and farm journalist Shree Padre said here on Friday that although two government research institutes have developed over 50 value‐added products from cashew apple, many remain on the shelves. Moreover, these products have failed to reach people and food processors for commercial production, he said.

Shroff also recently championed para-sports at the National Wheelchair Cricket Championship, urging for increased support and sponsorship.

articles.title: Is Thailand-based ⁠OBON ⁠Corp really 'Company-1', and were Nvidia chips sent to Alibaba? US probe tracks alleged AI server smuggling route
articles.description: Is Thailand-based ⁠OBON ⁠Corp really 'Company-1', and were Nvidia chips sent to Alibaba? A new report says the US suspects AI servers with Nvidia chips were routed through Southeast Asia to China. Prosecutors claim billions of dollars in technology moved through intermediaries. Nvidia, Alibaba and Super Micro issued responses. The case links export controls, supply chains and AI infrastructure, raising questions about compliance and cross-border tech trade.

articles.title: “Wildly disrespectful relationship to his wife”: Mike Vrabel accused of publicly humiliating wife Jen as Dianna Russini scandal keeps exploding
articles.description: Mike Vrabel is facing intense backlash after fresh details in the Dianna Russini controversy resurfaced online. Critics questioned his leadership and accused him of disrespecting his wife and family after reports linked him to a years-long relationship with Russini. The outrage intensified following old boat rental records and viral photos involving the pair. Former NFL voices also fueled speculation about the true nature of their relationship, keeping the controversy at the center of NFL discussions.

Luka Doncic injury update: Latest on Lakers star ahead of Game 2 vs Thunder
articles.description: Luka Doncic’s recovery from a Grade 2 hamstring strain continues to cloud the Lakers’ playoff hopes ahead of Game 2 against the Thunder. After undergoing PRP treatments in Spain, Doncic admitted there is still no firm return timeline, while medical criticism surrounding the treatment has intensified concern. With the Lakers trailing 1-0 and dealing with more injuries in the rotation, LeBron James and the rest of the roster face mounting pressure to keep the series alive without their superstar guard.

Tomorrow’s horoscope highlights a practical cosmic mood where clarity, patience, and emotional maturity can create real momentum. The horoscope for tomorrow suggests that for these four signs, career choices, relationship conversations, and personal discipline could shape what comes next. articles.title: Best of Both Sides | Sindoor 2.0 must go beyond deterrence
articles.description: Sindoor 2.0 should be designed not merely to punish but to extract concrete concessions. In return for the captured territory, India should insist on the repatriation and prosecution of terrorist leaders, dismantling of terror networks and public renunciation of state sponsorship for terrorism.

articles.title: Kasthuri Shankar backs Governor's move on TVK's majority claim
articles.description: Actor Kasthuri Shankar defended Governor Arlekar's decision to ask TVK to prove its majority, calling it lawful. She termed Vijay's win a 'vote against misrule' as the TVK, short of a majority, seeks support from CPI and VCK to form a government.

articles.description: Mitchell Marsh hit the fastest century for LSG in IPL history, a 49-ball ton, in a match against RCB. He scored 111 off 56 balls, becoming the franchise's fourth-highest run-scorer and securing his second ton for the team.

articles.title: Piyush Goyal, ICFA chair meet to boost farmer welfare, global agri role
articles.description: Piyush Goyal chaired meetings to improve farmer welfare and strengthen India's global agriculture standing. Discussions included cooperation with Africa and a roadmap for obtaining SPS approvals to boost agricultural and fisheries exports.

articles.title: ‘Entirely Inconsistent’: Trump Vs Pope Leo XIV Takes NEW Turn As Florida Bishop Steps Into Clash
articles.description: President Donald Trump is facing backlash from an unexpected place, his own Florida backyard. A Palm Beach bishop publicly defended Pope Leo XIV after Trump accused the pontiff of “endangering Catholics” over Iran comments. The clash comes as Secretary of State Marco Rubio meets Pope Leo at the Vatican amid growing tensions between Trump allies and the Catholic Church. The explosive Pope Leo vs Trump feud is now drawing reactions from religious leaders, political insiders, and critics online.#trump #popeleoxiv #pope #donaldtrump #florida #palmbeach #catholica #marcorubio #vatican #thevatican #trumpnews #vaticannews #popenews #italy

articles.title: FanDuel outage leaves users furious as betting app reportedly crashes; company gives update
articles.description: FanDuel down: FanDuel apparently experienced a significant server outage on May 7, preventing thousands of users from accessing the sports betting platform. Reports surged throughout the evening, with users unable to place bets or cash out during live games. FanDuel Support acknowledged the technical difficulties and is investigating the issue.
